questionText: Complete a frase com a forma verbal correta: 'The patient ___ from a rare autoimmune disorder for the past decade, making it difficult to manage her symptoms.'
Escolha a preposição correta: 'Doctors recommend that patients recovering ___ surgery should avoid strenuous physical activity for at least six weeks.'
Qual é o artigo correto? 'The cardiologist recommended ___ echocardiogram to assess the patient's cardiac function more accurately.'
Escolha a forma correta do verbo modal: 'Given the severity of her condition, she ___ have started treatment much earlier to prevent further complications.'
Complete com o pronome reflexivo adequado: 'The athlete pushed ___ too hard during training, which resulted in a serious muscle tear.'
Qual é a forma correta do comparativo? 'After switching to a plant-based diet, her cholesterol levels became ___ than they had been in years.'
Complete a frase com a conjunção correta: '___ the new medication proved effective in clinical trials, it was swiftly approved by health authorities.'
Escolha a voz passiva correta: 'The experimental drug ___ by thousands of volunteers before it received regulatory approval.'
Qual preposição está correta? 'The nurse administered the injection ___ the patient's upper arm, following standard protocol.'
Complete com o tempo verbal correto: 'By the time the ambulance arrived, the paramedics ___ CPR on the patient for nearly ten minutes.'
Escolha o quantificador correto: 'There is ___ scientific evidence to suggest that prolonged sleep deprivation contributes to metabolic disorders.'
Qual é a forma correta do condicional? 'If the surgeon ___ the correct procedure, the patient's recovery would have been significantly smoother.'
Complete com a preposição correta: 'The oncologist explained that the tumor was ___ an advanced stage and required immediate intervention.'
Qual verbo modal expressa obrigação formal no contexto médico? 'All healthcare professionals ___ adhere to strict hygiene protocols to minimize the risk of cross-contamination.'
Escolha a forma correta do gerúndio ou infinitivo: 'The physician advised the patient ___ alcohol entirely during the course of treatment.'
Complete com o tempo verbal adequado: 'Research ___ that regular meditation significantly reduces cortisol levels and improves overall mental health.'
Qual é o uso correto do particípio? 'The patient, ___ recently discharged from the ICU, was placed under close outpatient monitoring.'
Complete a frase com a estrutura correta: 'Not only ___ the medication alleviate chronic pain, but it also improved the patient's overall quality of life.'

Escolha a forma verbal correta para expressar uma suposição no passado: 'The patient's skin rash ___ caused by an allergic reaction to the prescribed antibiotic, based on the dermatologist's assessment.'
Qual é a construção correta com 'wish'? 'Many patients ___ they had adopted healthier dietary habits before developing type 2 diabetes.'
Complete a frase com a preposição correta: 'The new treatment protocol is aimed ___ reducing hospital readmission rates among post-surgical patients.'
Qual é a forma correta da voz passiva com modal? 'Patients with compromised immune systems ___ contacted by their healthcare providers immediately upon receiving abnormal test results.'
Escolha a estrutura de inversão correta: '___ the patient been administered the antidote sooner, the neurological damage could have been minimized.'
Complete com a forma correta do subjuntivo: 'The hospital board insisted that every surgeon ___ recertified before performing complex procedures.'
Qual é a forma correta do particípio perfeito em construção absoluta? '___ all available treatment options with the patient, the oncologist recommended a watchful waiting approach.'
Complete com o conector correto: 'The new vaccine proved highly effective; ___, health authorities recommended its widespread rollout across all age groups.'
Escolha o uso correto de 'despite' ou 'although': '___ undergoing six months of chemotherapy, the patient maintained a remarkably positive outlook throughout her treatment.'
Qual é a forma verbal correta no discurso indireto? 'The neurologist told the patient that he ___ further tests before drawing any conclusions about her condition.'
Complete com a preposição correta: 'The clinical guidelines are ___ compliance with international health standards and must be reviewed annually.'
Qual é a estrutura correta com 'such...that'? 'The patient's inflammation was ___ severe ___ the medical team decided to escalate treatment immediately.'
Escolha o uso correto do modal perfeito: 'Given the patient's prior history of cardiac events, the physician ___ ordered a stress test during the initial consultation.'
Complete a frase com o tempo verbal correto em oração temporal: 'The rehabilitation program will commence once the patient ___ cleared by the orthopedic surgeon.'
Qual é a estrutura correta de ênfase com cleft sentence? 'It was the prolonged exposure ___ environmental pollutants ___ ultimately triggered her respiratory illness.'
Qual é o uso correto do artigo em contexto técnico-médico? 'The researchers concluded that ___ use of corticosteroids in early intervention dramatically reduced the incidence of complications.'
Complete a frase com a forma verbal correta: 'Scarcely ___ the patient been admitted when his condition deteriorated rapidly, requiring emergency intervention.'
Escolha o uso correto de 'would rather': 'The patient said she ___ undergo physical therapy than resort to invasive surgical procedures at this stage of her treatment.'
Complete com a estrutura correta de inversão hipotética: '___ the clinical trial to yield inconclusive results, the research team would seek additional funding for a follow-up study.'

Qual é o uso correto do subjuntivo mandativo em registro formal? 'The ethics committee recommended that informed consent ___ obtained from all participants prior to the commencement of any invasive procedure.'
Escolha a construção nominal correta: 'The ___ of pharmaceutical compounds with a patient's existing medication regimen is a primary concern in polypharmacy management.'
Complete com a preposição mais precisa em contexto técnico: 'The meta-analysis drew ___ data from over forty randomized controlled trials conducted across six continents.'

Qual é a forma verbal mais adequada para expressar uma crítica velada no passado? 'The attending physician ___ been more forthcoming about the potential side effects of the prescribed immunosuppressants.'
Qual é a construção correta com gerúndio composto em voz passiva? 'The patient objected to ___ without prior notification, citing a violation of her medical privacy rights.'
Complete com a estrutura correta de 'no sooner': 'No sooner ___ the new antiretroviral therapy approved than pharmaceutical companies began competing for market dominance.'
Escolha a estrutura correta em inglês formal acadêmico: 'The extent ___ chronic psychological stress contributes to the pathogenesis of cardiovascular disease remains a subject of ongoing inquiry.'
Qual é a forma correta de particípio com valor condicional? '___ the dosage reduced gradually rather than abruptly, withdrawal symptoms could potentially have been avoided.'

Complete com a expressão adverbial mais adequada em inglês formal: 'The patient's prognosis, ___ unfavorable at initial diagnosis, improved substantially following the introduction of targeted therapy.'

Qual é a estrutura relativa correta em inglês formal? 'The longitudinal cohort study, the findings ___ have since been replicated across multiple independent investigations, reshaped global nutritional guidelines.'
Escolha a preposição correta em colocação técnica: 'The pathologist reported that the biopsy results were consistent ___ a diagnosis of early-stage melanoma.'
Qual é a forma mais gramaticalmente precisa da construção absoluta? '___ with the patient's consent and with full disclosure of potential risks, the experimental procedure was cleared to proceed.'

Complete a frase com a construção condicional mista correta: 'If the hospital ___ invested in preventive care infrastructure over the past decade, its current patient readmission rates would be considerably lower.'
Qual é o uso correto de 'lest' em inglês formal? 'The surgeon meticulously reviewed all pre-operative scans ___ critical anatomical details ___ overlooked during the procedure.'
Escolha a estrutura enfática mais formal: '___ the unwavering commitment of dedicated healthcare workers that sustained the public health system during the unprecedented crisis.'
